stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
By daylight a pilot continues a flight passing position 3 and is heading to position 4.
Which significant features will the pilot see when overhead position 3, assuming that the lookout is NOT obscured by clouds or fog?

options.a: Abeam (90°) on the left and right sides the terrain is rising, at 1 km distance ahead there is a hill top of 542 m.
options.b: Abeam (90°) on the left side the terrain is rising, at 4 km distance ahead there is a hill top of 484 m.
options.c: Abeam (90°) on the right side the terrain is rising to 542 m, at 250 m distance ahead there is a valley down to less than 400 m.
options.d: Abeam (90°) on the right side there is a hill top of 542 m, at 1 km distance ahead there is a hill top of 484 m.
